summary: Replaced the Python gemini-gateway CLI script with a full Go MCP server implementation. The new Go binary supports dual transport (stdio for auto-launch by Antigravity, HTTP via --http flag for dev), 9 MCP tools (dispatch, batch, status, jobs, pacing, stats, errors, cancel, retry), adaptive rate-limiting with per-model pacing, SOLID architecture with 4 segregated store interfaces, 50+ tests across 8 files, and a Makefile for setup/dev/build/test/coverage/install-mcp. Air hot-reload is configured for development.
